name: forecastedge
description: Weather forecast delta monitoring and staged Kalshi trading assistant.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @forecastedge/api & npm run dev --workspace @forecastedge/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @forecastedge/core && npm run build --workspace @forecastedge/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @forecastedge/core && npm run build --workspace @forecastedge/web
